message:
fix(scheduler): use record_cancel_dispatch in fallback path + fix comment

1. Fallback cancel dispatch path now calls record_cancel_dispatch()
   instead of manually incrementing cancel_dispatches. This ensures
   max_cancel_streak is correctly updated to reflect the true peak
   (effective_limit + 1 when fallback fires). Streak resets to 0
   after fallback to avoid skipping the ready-lane check on next call.

2. Fix misleading doc comment on inject_ready: the global ready queue
   uses FIFO (SegQueue), not priority ordering. Priority ordering is
   applied by the local PriorityScheduler after tasks are popped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
